retrieved_result: New request FAQg "Here you can send a request My enquiry is about: Do you wish support for the former SCS-Products? Choose this Option, if you have a Problem with the following Programms: Vegas Pro, Movie Studio, DVD Architect, Sound Forge, ACID Pro Do you wish to contact Sales Team? Please select this option to con"
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result is a support form for multimedia software (Vegas Pro, Movie Studio, etc.) and not about IDEs or software development environments; therefore it is not relevant to the query about top IDEs.
